delete.title: Delete Model
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the {{name}} model repository and all of its files, including weights.

recommended.title: Featured Model
recommended.label: Mark as featured model
recommended.confirmation: Are you sure you want to mark model {{name}} as a featured model?
recommended.unsetConfirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from featured models?

create.modelNameHelper: Supports letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, and dot. Must start with a letter or number.
create.projectTooltip: All models/datasets in a private project are private, and all models/datasets in a public project are public.
create.uploadTip: After creating the model, you can upload files using the command line.
